mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO setmeal_dish (setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) VALUES
(#{item.setmealId}, #{item.dishId}, #{item.name}, #{item.price}, #{item.copies})
mapper.select: SELECT sd.copies, s.description, s.image, sd.name FROM setmeal_dish sd JOIN setmeal s ON sd.setmeal_id = s.id WHERE sd.setmeal_id = #{setmealId}
